mapper.insert: INSERT INTO century (nickname, main_char, level, job, upper_noble, grantor) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{mainChar}, #{level}, #{job}, #{upperNoble}, #{grantor})
mapper.select: SELECT nickname FROM century WHERE main_char = #{mainChar} AND upper_noble = 0;
SELECT nickname FROM century WHERE main_char = #{mainChar} AND upper_noble = 1;
SELECT * FROM century WHERE nickname LIKE '%${searchStr}%' WHERE job LIKE '%${searchStr}%' ORDER BY ${order}
SELECT main_char FROM century WHERE nickname LIKE '%${searchStr}%' AND main_char is not null
